requests.assets_available: Client name, email, package, budget, rush timing, payment, and logo direction are confirmed. Next asset checkpoint is preparing initial logo previews for client review.

requests.request: Build a website and logo package for Omni Global Solutions LLC. Logo direction: “Omni” in nice writing, “Global” with the O being a globe. This lead came through the ShopNasGraphics Name Your Price form and has been approved into an OwnYourWeb project packet.
requests.assets_available: Logo direction provided: Omni nice writing, Global with the O being a globe. Additional website copy, brand colors, service details, and contact info still need to be collected from the client.
next_steps: Start logo design base for Omni Global Solutions LLC
Send first logo previews to Torrance for direction
Collect website copy, services, preferred colors, and contact info
Draft homepage structure after logo direction is approved
requests.project_update: Payment sent and received. Next active phase is logo design base and initial previews.
